questions.question: Which of the following is the correct way to create a new folder on the desktop in Windows?
questions.option_2: Open Task Manager → Click on New Folder
questions.option_4: Drag an icon from Start Menu to desktop

questions.question: While multitasking, which of the following best describes what happens when Alt + Tab is used repeatedly?
questions.option_2: It cycles through open applications in the order of last use.

questions.question: Which of the following helps in organizing files?
questions.option_2: Placing all files on the desktop
questions.option_3: Saving all files in one folder

questions.question: Which option in the Control Panel allows a user to add or remove hardware devices in MS Windows?
questions.option_2: Security and Maintenance

questions.question: What does the abbreviation ASCII stand for?
questions.option_1: American Scientific Code for Internet Integration
questions.option_2: American Standard Code for Information Interchange
questions.option_3: Automatic System for Coding Interactive Interfaces
questions.option_4: Advanced System for Computer Input and Integration

questions.question: Which of the following is the function of the Central Processing Unit (CPU) in a computer?
questions.option_1: It sends output to printers and monitors.
questions.option_2: It processes data and controls operations of all parts of the computer.
questions.option_3: It stores all user files permanently.
questions.option_4: It receives input from the keyboard and mouse only.

questions.question: What does the abbreviation 'PCB' stand for in operating systems?
questions.option_2: Primary Communication Bus

questions.question: Which of the following elements provides access to system settings, installed programs, and power options from the desktop?
questions.option_2: Notification Area

questions.question: Which keyboard button is used as a shortcut to rename a selected file or folder in Windows?
questions.option_2: F2

questions.question: What does Ctrl + F help users to do?
questions.option_2: Find a file on the desktop
questions.option_3: Find text in the current document or webpage

questions.question: Which of the following is the correct method to create a new folder using the File menu in Windows 7?
questions.option_1: Open Computer → Open desired drive (e.g., D:) → Click on File → New → Folder
questions.option_2: Start → File → Folder → New
questions.option_3: Control Panel → File → Create → New Folder
questions.option_4: Open Computer → Right-click drive → File → New → Folder

questions.question: You want to create a file called "Notes.txt". Which tool would you use?
questions.option_2: Paint

questions.question: Which of the following are main subsystems of the Central Processing Unit (CPU)?
questions.option_1: Arithmetic Unit, Memory Unit and Output Unit
questions.option_2: Logic Unit, Input Unit and Storage Unit
questions.option_3: Control Unit, Arithmetic Unit and Logic Unit
questions.option_4: Arithmetic Unit, Graphics Unit and Control Bus

questions.question: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) is a premier S&T organisation under which of the following ministries of the Government of India?
questions.option_1: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
questions.option_2: Ministry of Science and Technology

questions.question: Which shortcut key opens System Settings quickly in Windows 10/11?
questions.option_2: Windows + I

questions.question: What happens when you double-click an icon on the desktop?
questions.option_2: It gets deleted.
questions.option_4: It opens the application or file.

questions.question: Which of the following is the correct method to rename a file or folder using the left mouse button?
questions.option_1: Double-click the file name → Type the new name → Press Esc
questions.option_2: Select the file → Press F2 or click once on the name → Type new name → Press Enter
questions.option_3: Select the file → Press F1 → Type new name → Press Enter
questions.option_4: Click and drag the file → Rename it in the pop-up window

questions.question: The _____ developed 32-bit microprocessors for space applications named VIKRAM3201 and KALPANA3201.
questions.option_2: European Space Agency

questions.question: Which of the following correctly differentiates between RAM and ROM?
questions.option_1: ROM performs all logical operations, while RAM controls input devices
questions.option_2: RAM is permanent memory while ROM is volatile
questions.option_3: RAM loses its content when the computer is turned off, while ROM retains its data
questions.option_4: ROM is used to store data temporarily during program execution

questions.question: Which of the following pairs correctly classifies one input and one output device?
questions.option_1: Keyboard – Output device, Printer – Input device
questions.option_2: Mouse – Output device, Scanner – Input device
questions.option_3: Joystick – Output device, Speaker – Input device
questions.option_4: Microphone – Input device, Monitor – Output device

questions.question: What is the function of the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + Z?
questions.option_2: Undo the last action

questions.question: Select the correct sequence of steps to create a new folder on the desktop?
questions.option_1: Right-click Taskbar → Select Folder → Press Enter
questions.option_2: Open File Explorer → Right-click Desktop → New Folder

questions.question: What does ASCII stand for?
questions.option_1: American Standard Code for Information Interchange
questions.option_2: Auxiliary System for Communication and Interchange
questions.option_3: Advanced Standard Coding in Information Industry
questions.option_4: Automated System for Computer Information Interchange

questions.question: Which of the following accurately represents the two main components of the CPU and their functions?
questions.option_1: ALU and CU – Perform calculations and control all computer operations
questions.option_2: RAM and ROM – Store data and instructions permanently
questions.option_3: Monitor and Keyboard – Control the speed of data processing
questions.option_4: HDD and SSD – Perform data input and output tasks

questions.question: In FIFO scheduling, which process is executed first?
questions.option_1: The process with the shortest execution time
questions.option_2: The process that arrives first
questions.option_4: The process with the highest priority
